notes: Single event in chunk: 10-K 0001104659-24-027565 part 2/6 (business section + MD&A results of operations); no fiscal_kpis field present in this chunk.
All 41 evidence quotes were programmatically verified as exact substrings of the event content.

Skipped as vague/non-causal/banned (21): geopolitical unrest (bare category), consumer behavior shifts (vague), seasonality (stated immaterial), holiday timing (period-adjacent), 53rd fiscal week (period token), bare revenue (category), average weekly sales and operating weeks (covered by same_store_sales + new_restaurant_development), staff absenteeism (covered by pandemic), G&A expense (no causal attribution; glue-word name), distributor concentration, dairy/poultry specific commodity costs (listed but no cost change attributed), data privacy regulation, cybersecurity (no incident), tip/FICA reporting, equity compensation dilution, interest expense, income tax benefit, media impressions, FRC sales (subsidiary legal name banned), permitting/landlord delays (state folded into new_restaurant_development).

Named new_restaurant_development rather than new_restaurant_openings because opening is a banned state word; brand-level drivers (north_italia_same_store_sales, flower_child_sales, cheesecake_rewards_program) kept separate from company-wide forms per ontology R9.
